title: Convergence Loop State
description: Serializable state for the automated dev loop conductor. Written to loop-state.json after every state transition.

iteration.description: Current iteration within the current phase

max_phase_iterations.description: Maximum iterations per review phase before escalation

findings_trend.description: Blocking finding count per review round (for stall detection)

blocking_findings.description: Current blocking findings from latest consensus

vendor_availability.description: Map of vendor name to availability status

packages_status.description: Map of package_id to completion status

package_authors.description: Map of package_id to vendor name that authored/implemented it

implementation_strategy.description: Map of package_id to chosen implementation strategy

memory_ids.description: Coordinator episodic memory IDs written during this loop

handoff_ids.description: Coordinator handoff document IDs written during this loop

previous_phase.description: Phase before ESCALATE was entered (for resume)

escalation_reason.description: Diagnostic message explaining why ESCALATE was entered

val_review_enabled.description: Whether VAL_REVIEW phase is enabled (set by complexity gate)

error.description: Last error message if in ESCALATE state
